ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly version of the article title */,
  "body" TEXT /* Main content of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "image_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the main image of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "status" TEXT /* Publication status (draft, published, archived) */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the article is featured */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the article */,
  "views_today" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received today */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the article has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the article has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_image_reference FOREIGN KEY ("image_reference") REFERENCES media ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., admin, editor, contributor) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the author */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Preferred locale for the author */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON column to store links to the author's social media profiles */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the author has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Tag status (active, inactive) */,
  "parent_tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent tag (for hierarchical tags) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tag */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_parent_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-tag relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article-tag relationship (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media asset */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media asset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media asset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the media asset was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the media asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the media asset (active, inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the media asset */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for images for accessibility */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Information about the copyright of the media asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (active, inactive, deleted) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reader, author, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON column to store user preferences (e.g., email notifications, dark mode) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Preferred locale for the user */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of authors the user is following */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
